# Sestito Electrical LLC

> Sestito Electrical LLC is a licensed master electrician business based in Middleton, Massachusetts, serving the entire North Shore of Massachusetts. Owner-operator Stefano Sestito is a 20-year union-trained journeyman who personally leads every job, specializing in luxury residential wiring, EV charger installation, service panel upgrades, commercial fit-outs, and pool/sauna/generator electrical work.

## Key facts

- **Business name:** Sestito Electrical LLC
- **Owner-operator:** Stefano Sestito, Master Electrician
- **Founded:** 2020
- **Home base:** Middleton, Massachusetts (01949)
- **Phone:** 617-529-1019
- **Email:** Stefano.sestito@yahoo.com
- **Website:** https://sestitoelectrical.com
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/sestito_electrical/
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/stefano-sestito-b69319398
- **Licensing:** Massachusetts Master Electrician license. Licensed, bonded, and insured.
- **Union affiliation:** Union-trained journeyman, 20 years
- **Prior experience:** Foreman on large-scale commercial and healthcare electrical projects in Greater Boston
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 7am–6pm, Sat 8am–2pm

## Service area

Primary service area is the North Shore of Massachusetts, Essex County:

- Middleton, MA (home base)
- Topsfield, MA
- Boxford, MA
- Hamilton, MA
- Wenham, MA
- Ipswich, MA
- Manchester-by-the-Sea, MA
- Beverly, MA
- Danvers, MA
- Andover, MA
- North Andover, MA
- Lynnfield, MA
- North Reading, MA
- Marblehead, MA
- Peabody, MA
- Gloucester, MA

Stefano also travels throughout Massachusetts, New Hampshire, and Rhode Island for larger projects.

## Services offered

1. **Luxury Residential Electrical** — Complete electrical design and installation for custom homes and high-end renovations. Circuit design, premium fixture installation, smart home integration, specialty lighting, whole-home rewiring.

2. **EV Charger Installation** — Tesla Wall Connector, universal NEMA 14-50 outlets, and hardwired Level 2 EV chargers from every major brand. Includes proper load calculation, dedicated circuit, and permit coordination.

3. **Service Panel Upgrades** — 100A, 200A, and 400A panel upgrades. Old fuse box replacement. Meter relocations. Code-compliant grounding and bonding.

4. **Saunas, Spas & Pool Electrical** — GFCI circuits, dedicated runs, bonding grid, sub-panels, and heater wiring for residential saunas, hot tubs, in-ground pools, and spa equipment.

5. **Outdoor Lighting & Fountains** — Low-voltage landscape lighting, hardscape lighting, architectural up-lighting, pump wiring for water features, transformer installation.

6. **Commercial Fit-outs** — Tenant build-outs, office fit-outs, restaurant kitchens, retail spaces. Service entrance through finish wiring with permit coordination.

7. **Generator Installation** — Whole-home and partial-load standby generator installation. Automatic transfer switches. Portable generator inlet boxes.

8. **Troubleshooting & Repair** — Tripping breakers, dead outlets, flickering lights, burned connections, code corrections, insurance-related repairs.

Sestito Electrical also takes on miscellaneous projects beyond this list. If it runs on electricity, Stefano has likely worked on it.

## How to hire Sestito Electrical

Every project starts with a free on-site walkthrough. Stefano reviews the scope, discusses options honestly, and delivers an itemized written estimate within a few days. All permit and inspection costs are included up front. Response time is one business day or less.

- **To request an estimate:** Call 617-529-1019 or email Stefano.sestito@yahoo.com
- **For urgent repairs:** Call 617-529-1019 directly

## What makes Sestito Electrical different

- **Union-trained craftsmanship:** 20 years of formal union training, apprenticed and journeyman-licensed
- **Owner-operated:** Stefano is personally on site for every job — no salesman handoffs, no revolving crew
- **Transparent pricing:** Itemized written estimates with permits and inspection costs included up front
- **Commercial-grade discipline applied to residential work:** Background in large-scale hospital and stadium-grade commercial electrical builds across Greater Boston
